subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh with truth is verily the Speaker of Sinai through Whom hath arisen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لمکلم الطور الذی به قام من
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
